content:
# Pickering Emulsion

**Summary**: An emulsion stabilized by solid particles at the oil-water interface.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] developed a Pickering-emulsion to improve thermal stability and reduce drag.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] Offers improved thermal stability and resistance to coalescence compared to surfactant-based emulsions.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] Comparison with standard emulsified acid systems.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Pickering ENS showed lower drag compared to normal EAS even after adding CNDs. ([[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023, p. 18]])
